report.summary: UX audit and fixes for 4 new learn pages (smart-contract-security, onchain-identity, zkml, ai-agent-identity-nhi), created 2 OG images, added Breadcrumb/StructuredData/OpenGraph metadata across all pages, fixed server component event handler issues, and improved responsive typography.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: smart-contract-security-guide: Added Breadcrumb component (Home > Learn > Smart Contract Security Guide)
smart-contract-security-guide: Added StructuredData FAQPage schema for 6 FAQ items
smart-contract-security-guide: Added OpenGraph + Twitter Card metadata with OG image reference

smart-contract-security-guide: Fixed server component event handlers — removed onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave from related articles cards (incompatible with server components), replaced with CSS hover via style tag
smart-contract-security-guide: Added responsive H1 sizing with clamp(28px, 6vw, 48px)
onchain-identity-guide: Added Breadcrumb component (Home > Learn > Onchain Identity Guide)
onchain-identity-guide: Added StructuredData FAQPage schema for 6 FAQ items
onchain-identity-guide: Added OpenGraph + Twitter Card metadata with OG image reference
onchain-identity-guide: Improved related articles grid from single-column to responsive 2-column on desktop (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2)
zkml-guide-2026: Fixed OG image URLs from .png to .svg for consistency
zkml-guide-2026: Added responsive H1 sizing with clamp(1.8rem, 5vw, 2.4rem)
ai-agent-identity-nhi-guide: Removed invalid 'use client' directive (conflicts with metadata export)
ai-agent-identity-nhi-guide: Added OpenGraph images and URL to metadata
ai-agent-identity-nhi-guide: Extracted interactive elements (ToC hover, related cards hover) into separate client components (InteractiveTOC.tsx, InteractiveCards.tsx)
ai-agent-identity-nhi-guide: Added responsive H1 sizing with clamp(1.8rem, 5vw, 2.5rem)

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: zkml-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme with ZK proof neural network visualization, brand gradient, category badges
OG image: ai-agent-identity-nhi-guide (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme with agent identity node diagram (DID, wallet, attestation, permissions), brand gradient, category badges

sections.title: Files Modified
items: src/app/learn/smart-contract-security-guide/page.tsx — Breadcrumb, StructuredData, OG metadata, responsive title, CSS hover fix
src/app/learn/onchain-identity-guide/page.tsx — Breadcrumb, StructuredData, OG metadata, responsive grid
src/app/learn/zkml-guide-2026/page.tsx — OG image URL fix, responsive title
src/app/learn/ai-agent-identity-nhi-guide/page.tsx — Removed use client, added OG metadata, extracted interactive components, responsive title
src/app/learn/ai-agent-identity-nhi-guide/InteractiveTOC.tsx — New client component for ToC hover effects
src/app/learn/ai-agent-identity-nhi-guide/InteractiveCards.tsx — New client component for related cards hover effects
public/og-zkml-guide-2026.svg — New OG image
public/og-ai-agent-identity-nhi-guide.svg — New OG image

sections.title: UX Audit Findings (Carry-Over)
items: 122 of 176 learn pages still missing OG images — systematic batch creation recommended
Several learn pages likely missing Breadcrumb and StructuredData components — bulk audit recommended
Server component event handler pattern (onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave) may exist on other learn pages — needs codebase-wide grep
